driverAPIs.name: 1. Fetch Active Car Categories (For Dropdown)
driverAPIs.description: Fetch all categories (Bike, Auto, Sedan) to show IDs in Driver Registration form.

driverAPIs.name: 2. Register New Driver (Full Specs)
driverAPIs.description: Automatically sets createdBy: VendorID and createdByModel: Vendor.

driverAPIs.name: 3. List My Drivers
driverAPIs.description: List of all drivers created by this Vendor with status.

driverAPIs.name: 4. Get Driver Details
driverAPIs.description: Full detailed profile of a specific driver.

driverAPIs.name: 5. Update Driver Information
driverAPIs.description: Update specific fields of a driver.

driverAPIs.name: 6. Delete Driver
driverAPIs.description: Permanently remove a driver from the vendor's team.
